title: Peak XV joins UK infrastructure startup Primer’s $100 million funding round
summary: Peak XV Partners has joined a $100 million fundraise for global payments infrastructure startup Primer, marking another overseas investment for the Indian VC firm. The funding will accelerate AI investments and US expansion, where Primer expects significant revenue growth.

This marks a strong turnaround from the previous year's loss. Revenue from operations saw robust growth, contributing to improved operating leverage.
